Managed outputs allowed: Configured low-power outputs only; OUT3 OUT4 OUT6 OUT7 off
C36 behavior: May source an accessory when generator margin is adequate
Exit or protection behavior: Normal IIN_SENSE and per-channel limits remain active

Managed outputs allowed: OUT3 OUT4 OUT6 OUT7 plus configured low-power outputs
Fog behavior: Short FOG press toggles request; OUT3/OUT4 first then OUT6/OUT7 after configurable delay
C36 behavior: May source an accessory only with generator margin
Entry conditions: Valid configuration no fault acceptable VBAT_SENSE and available engine state
Exit or protection behavior: Shed OUT6/OUT7 then OUT3/OUT4 then other managed outputs; critical undervoltage disables OUT1 through OUT10

C36 behavior: USB load removed and rescue charging not active
Entry conditions: Motorcycle stopped compressor rated no more than 10-12 A separate fuse and acceptable VBAT_SENSE
Exit or protection behavior: Undervoltage overcurrent fault or configurable 10-15 minute timer disables OUT1

C36 behavior: Power bank may charge battery through independent C36_BIDIRECTIONAL branch
Entry conditions: PB-100 and LB-100 may be off; manufacturer cable and procedure required
Exit or protection behavior: No managed output may start; C36 is not a starter-current source

Entry conditions: Ignition or engine state indicates off
Exit or protection behavior: Warn against unnoticed accessory discharge; firmware cannot guarantee C36 disconnection
